title: War of narratives in the United States: "The distortion between his rhetoric and reality will discourage Trump voters"

world.title: War of narratives in the United States: "The distortion between his rhetoric and reality will discourage Trump voters"

environment.compositionIntent: High-key paper/ochre surround preserves the accepted de Kooning-style environment as technical support while leaving the selected-news fracture and artist mark-field to carry the readable black contour web, right-side pressure band, and red/ochre narrative distortion.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained as the fixed design bookmark: this is an abstract all-over field with no explicit subject, and supplied evidence does not require a close crop or portrait-specific reframing.

contrast.notes: Warm paper lighting protects pale negative space and keeps dark contours readable without adding a generic glow or bloom layer.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: technical support/compatibility part: renderer environment object, camera-safe world context, and optional atmosphere only when declared by visualConstructionDecision
room for the selected-news transformation and optional artist-style carrier to read
avoid: claiming visible construction not declared by visualConstructionDecision
stealing selected-news transformation or artist-style carrier ownership

compositionAdaptations: Kept at the origin as the accepted WebGPU-safe technical support environment.
Opacity and motion are restrained so the environment supplies pale paper, blurred grid pressure, dark distance band, and red/ochre atmosphere without stealing selected-news transformation ownership.
Kept at origin as pale technical support, with restrained opacity and motion so it supports rather than dominates the selected-news and artist lanes.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the supplied local concept reference directly: broad high-key paper/ochre field, asymmetric black contour web, dark right-side pressure, and orange-red accents were used only as advisory palette/value/density guidance.
Static check succeeded for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no validation errors.
Playwright preview attempt 2 captured desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json proves WebGPU backend rendering and WebGPU-safe feature evidence: MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, material factories sky-background-field/color-field/procedural-marks/soft-particles, and utilities.createDirectionSpaceSkyboxShell.

Screenshot inspection showed a nonblank high-key de Kooning support environment: pale paper field, asymmetric matte planes, visible broken contour web, dark band pressure, and red/ochre distortion accents while leaving the primary news fracture and artist mark-field lanes open.

compositionAdaptations: Held in the declared selected-news transformation lane as the main readable fracture system.

Kept near center and in the mid-depth envelope so black contour crossings, right dark reality band, ochre rhetoric scrape, red Trump cue slash, and measured public grid pulse read across desktop and mobile.
Motion intensity stays low to preserve the packet's steady-grid-pulse meaning without turning the still composition into unrelated animation.
Held near center as the primary selected-news fracture system; scale and depth preserve the black contour crossings, right dark band, red Trump cue slash, ochre scrape, and measured grid pulse.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected concept-reference image directly as advisory-only media: broad cream/peach geometric planes, black contour web, dark right band, ochre/red accents, all-over fractured rhythm.
Static draft check succeeded with no validation errors.
Playwright preview attempt 1 succeeded with captureStatus ok and healthStatus ok.

Desktop screenshot showed a readable asymmetric field of large pale/peach/grey planes, a heavy right dark reality band, black crossing contours, red-orange distortion slash, ochre rhetoric scrapes, drips, scratches, and measured grid-pulse pigment points.

Render report confirmed WebGPU renderer/backend, standard MeshBasicMaterial/LineBasicMaterial/PointsMaterial surfaces, materialFactoryId evidence for color-field/procedural-marks/soft-particles, and WebGPU native helper evidence for utilities.createAnimatedInstancedMarkField.

compositionEvidence.draftIntent: Assemble accepted WebGPU-compatible de Kooning/war-narratives parts into a high-key all-over abstract field: environment as pale support, non-literal-fracture-transformation as the selected-news split, and artist-mark-field as a restrained artist-language overlay.
rendererCompatibilityPreserved: world-environment keeps accepted MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, sky-background-field factory, and direction-space-skybox-shell helper evidence refs.
non-literal-fracture-transformation keeps accepted MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, and animated-instanced-mark-field helper evidence refs.
artist-mark-field keeps accepted MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, and animated-instanced-mark-field helper evidence refs.

previewEvidence.verdict: Accepted after attempt 1: desktop keeps the all-over asymmetric paper field, black contour crossings, dark right pressure band, red-orange Trump cue slash, ochre scrape, and scratch/pigment texture readable. Mobile crops into the central fracture but preserves the red slash, dark band, contour web, and pale negative-space structure.
previewEvidence.rendererNote: Preview render reports captured with healthStatus ok and webgpuFeatureFacts present for the accepted parts. The local preview runtime reported actualRendererMode webgl-legacy / webgl2, so renderer compatibility is preserved through accepted part feature evidence rather than claimed from the preview backend.

visualContract.subject: abstract no-subject all-over de Kooning-inspired narrative fracture field
invariants: primary fracture remains readable without replacing accepted modules
artist mark field enriches material texture without obscuring the selected-news signal
allowedDivergences: final 3D assembly may be paler and more atmospheric than the concept reference because accepted parts use a camera-space paper environment
no exact concept-reference image matching is required

takeaways: Use the canonical public camera as the fixed design bookmark unless Playwright desktop and mobile evidence proves framing failure.
Keep output grade subtle and renderer-owned; do not use exposure to repair part balance or claim extra post pipelines.
Evaluate final acceptance from deterministic desktop and mobile screenshots plus render reports, with attention to readable value range, contour separation, accent control, and WebGPU backend health.

image.altText: War of narratives in the United States: "The distortion between his rhetoric and reality will discourage Trump voters" by Willem de Kooning.
